meta.title: The Augmented Train
meta.author: story-engine
meta.description: You enter an augmented reality. Navigate a train world that reveals your social nature.

story_a::E1.question: You find it easy to introduce yourself to other people.
story_a::E1.storyline: You were spawned as a train operator. Which train do you want to enter?

A.storyChoice: Enter the train with many people in it
A.bridge: The train is full of passengers and very noisy. So noisy you can barely hear your own thoughts.

B.bridge: The train currently has one other passenger, that is your co-worker

story_a::E2.question: You prefer to be in the center of attention.
story_a::E2.storyline: While you were trying your best to focus on your job amidst the chaos, a group of angry-looking people came to ask when the train is going to reach a certain stop.

A.bridge: After answering the group’s questions, many more people start asking. By the time you finish answering everyone, the train reaches its final stop.

B.bridge: You tell them to be patient, escape to the back of the train, and work alone away from the chaos.

story_a::E3.question: You prefer to interact with many people at once over one-on-one conversations.
story_a::E3.storyline: After finishing some checkups on the empty train, you get the idea of talking to your co-worker to pass the time.

A.bridge: You put on your earbuds and listen to music until the train reaches its final stop.

B.bridge: You enjoy a long conversation, discover many shared interests, say goodbye, and return to work.

story_a::E4.question: You are comfortable with small talk and chatting with strangers.
story_a::E4.storyline: While fixing some parts of the train, one of your coworkers asks if they can join you and help.

A.bridge: You work together, make small talk, and fix the train efficiently.

B.storyChoice: Tell them you can do it alone
B.bridge: You work alone. It takes more time and effort, but you enjoy the solitude.

meta.title: The Dinosaur Jungle
meta.author: story-engine
meta.description: A white portal drops you into a vast jungle. Your choices reveal how you approach plans and decisions.

story_b::P1.question: You prefer to have a detailed schedule rather than a flexible one.
story_b::P1.storyline: You find yourself in a huge jungle filled with tall trees and distant dinosaur roars. A glowing portal is visible ahead.

A.bridge: You move deeper into the jungle, noticing claw marks on trees and crushed ferns near a narrow path.

B.bridge: You sprint toward the portal on the hill as the ground begins to shake.

story_b::P2.question: You tend to make decisions spontaneously rather than following a strict plan.
story_b::P2.storyline: The claw marks suggest danger nearby. You must decide how to move forward.

A.bridge: You carefully avoid danger and reach the portal without complications.

B.storyChoice: Walk quickly through the marked path
B.bridge: A dinosaur is alerted. You run for your life and barely escape toward the portal.

story_b::P3.question: You prefer to keep your options open rather than finalizing a decision early.
story_b::P3.storyline: The ground shakes violently. A loud roar erupts behind you — closer than before.

A.bridge: You trust your instincts and leap through the portal without hesitation.

B.bridge: You see the dinosaur charging toward you as the portal flickers ahead.

story_b::P4.question: You prefer sticking to a plan rather than adapting on the fly.
story_b::P4.storyline: The portal flickers unstably as heavy footsteps shake the ground behind you.

A.storyChoice: Wait for the portal to stabilize
A.bridge: You time your jump perfectly and safely enter the portal.

B.bridge: The unstable portal throws you back and a dinosaur catches you — but you still advance to the next stage.

meta.title: The Robot Workshop
meta.author: story-engine
meta.description: A robot-creating machine awaits. How you build reveals how you perceive the world.

story_c::S1.question: You focus more on facts than ideas.
story_c::S1.storyline: You discover a robot-creating machine. Your goal is to build a robot that helps with home chores.

A.storyChoice: Give the robot a friendly, conversational personality
A.bridge: The robot begins chatting and moving around the house energetically.

B.storyChoice: Give the robot a focused, practical personality
B.bridge: The robot starts surveying laundry, dishes, and scattered items efficiently.

story_c::S2.question: You are more inclined to use tried and true methods than experiment with new ones.
story_c::S2.storyline: Your practical robot begins organizing chores throughout the house.

A.storyChoice: Let it adapt and switch tasks freely
A.bridge: The robot behaves creatively, jumping between tasks as it sees fit.

B.storyChoice: Clean one room at a time methodically
B.bridge: Each task is double-checked, resulting in a perfectly clean home.

story_c::S3.question: You prefer concrete facts over abstract theories.
story_c::S3.storyline: Your friendly robot hums tunes, comments on the mess, and moves freely between chores.

A.bridge: The robot becomes a delightful companion and helpful assistant.

B.storyChoice: Force it to focus strictly on cleaning
B.bridge: The robot loses its uniqueness and struggles to adapt.

story_c::S4.question: You trust real experience over intuition.
story_c::S4.storyline: A sudden problem occurs: the blender tips over, the cat runs wild, and lights flicker.

A.storyChoice: Analyze and fix problems one by one
A.bridge: The robot calmly resolves each issue with precision.

B.bridge: The robot causes chaos but somehow survives the situation.

meta.title: The Future Company
meta.author: story-engine
meta.description: You manage a growing company. Your decisions reveal how you judge and decide.

story_d::T1.question: You make decisions based on logic rather than emotions.
story_d::T1.storyline: In the future, you are managing a growing company with your father and need to hire someone for a critical role.

A.bridge: The robot guarantees efficiency, accuracy, and unbiased decision-making. Productivity increases immediately.

B.bridge: The human hire brings empathy, creativity, and improves team morale.

story_d::T2.question: You value consistency and fairness over personal feelings.
story_d::T2.storyline: Your company needs to launch an advertising campaign for a new product.

A.bridge: The ads are efficient, clear, and focused entirely on results.

B.bridge: The ads emotionally engage people and strengthen long-term brand loyalty.

story_d::T3.question: You find it easy to empathize with others’ feelings.
story_d::T3.storyline: You are deciding how to promote your product to the public.

A.bridge: The campaign builds a strong emotional connection but takes time to show measurable results.

B.bridge: The product sells, but the brand feels impersonal and uninspiring.

story_d::T4.question: You prioritize harmony and other people’s feelings over strict logic.
story_d::T4.storyline: A very angry client contacts you about a serious problem with an important project.

A.storyChoice: Send a detailed email explaining everything
A.bridge: The situation is handled logically with clear documentation and professional clarity.

B.storyChoice: Meet the client personally to talk it through
B.bridge: You empathize with the client, rebuild trust, and resolve the conflict through human connection.
